title: El Affroun Heat Wave
lead: El Affroun is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.40. This extreme weather event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in El Affroun is causing temperatures to soar, with a high CDD of 10.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 40%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed of 16.2 km/h may provide some relief, but the overall conditions remain critical.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in El Affroun.
